guestExperience.title: Booking & welcome

guestExperience.subtitleUpsells: Sell add-on services to your guests

upsells.intro: Offer paid services to your guests (early check-in, cleaning, transfer…). Payment happens from the guide; your share is paid out via your usual payouts (the platform takes a commission).

messages.confirmDeleteHint: This service and its details will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.

commissions.note: Your share of activity bookings, paid out via your usual payouts. Active once an activity provider is connected.

orgCommission.title: My commission (management)
orgCommission.note: Your share of the remainder after the platform commission. The owner receives the balance.

declaration.title: A few details to confirm your arrival

declaration.errorSubmit: Submission failed. Please check your details and try again.
declaration.privacy: Your data is securely sent to your host and kept only for the legally required period.

noise.offersSubtitle: Enable noise monitoring to track noise levels in your properties in real-time.

minut.detailDescription: Minut offers certified noise sensors with native Airbnb integration. The monthly subscription includes access to the dedicated mobile app, automatic guest alerts and 24/7 support.

clenzy.detailDescription: Our Tuya OEM-based solution provides noise monitoring with no monthly subscription. The BAITLY-TUYA-NM-01 sensor integrates natively into the Baitly platform with real-time data.

config.title: Sensor configuration
config.selectPropertyDesc: Choose the property where the sensor will be installed.
config.roomDesc: If you want to monitor a specific room, enter its name. Leave empty to monitor the entire property.
config.nameDesc: Give your sensor a name to easily identify it in the dashboard.

smartLock.title: Smart Locks
smartLock.subtitle: Configure and control your smart locks per property.
smartLock.offersSubtitle: Manage access to your properties with Tuya-compatible smart locks.

nuki.offersSubtitle: Integrate your Nuki Smart Lock for professional access control via the Nuki Web API.
nuki.feature2: Temporary access codes via Nuki Web API

accounting.title: Accounting
accounting.subtitle: Owner payouts, commissions, expenses and accounting exports

help.title: How do payouts work?
help.description: Payouts let you calculate and track the amounts owed to each property owner.
help.step1Desc: Select an owner and a period to calculate the payout.
help.step2Desc: The system calculates: revenue − commission − expenses = net amount.
help.step3Desc: Approve the payout then mark it as paid after the bank transfer.

payouts.emptyDescription: Generate your first payout to calculate the amount owed to an owner.

help.title: How do commissions work?
help.description: Commissions represent the percentage charged by each booking channel (Airbnb, Booking...) on your revenue.
help.step1Desc: Each platform (Airbnb, Booking...) applies a different commission rate.
help.step2Desc: Adjust the commission rate for each channel according to your contract.
help.step3Desc: Commissions are automatically deducted when calculating owner payouts.

help.title: How does the fiscal report work?
help.description: View the VAT summary of your invoices by period to prepare your tax returns.
help.step1Desc: Choose the granularity (monthly, quarterly, annual) and the desired period.
help.step2Desc: The report automatically breaks down VAT by rate (20%, 10%, 5.5%) and category.
help.step3Desc: Use the excl./VAT/incl. totals to complete your VAT return.

exports.title: Accounting Exports

help.title: How do exports work?
help.description: Export your accounting data in various formats for your accountant or tax returns.
help.step1Desc: Define the date range for the data to export.
help.step2Desc: FEC (DGFiP standard), CSV reservations, payouts, expenses or invoices.
help.step3Desc: Click Download to get the file ready to send.

exports.fecDesc: French legal accounting entries file (tab-separated, DGFiP standard)
exports.reservationsCsvDesc: Raw export of all reservations for the period
exports.payoutsCsvDesc: Owner payouts with commissions and expenses
exports.expensesCsvDesc: Provider expenses with excl./incl. tax amounts and VAT
exports.invoicesCsvDesc: All invoices issued for the period

help.title: How do expenses work?
help.description: Track and manage provider expenses (cleaning, maintenance...) related to your properties.
help.step1Desc: Add an expense with the provider, property, amount and category.
help.step2Desc: Validate draft expenses. Attach a receipt (PDF, photo).
help.step3Desc: Approved expenses are automatically deducted from owner payouts.

settings.title: Settings
settings.default: Configure your application to match your preferences

subtitle.general: Identity, organization, regional preferences and display.
subtitle.notifications: Configure your channels (in-app, email, push) and granularity per event type.
subtitle.messaging: Guest messaging automations (check-in, welcome, pricing push) and templates.
subtitle.myPayout: Your bank transfer settings: IBAN, frequency, minimum threshold.
subtitle.ai: Connect your OpenAI/Anthropic key or use the shared quota. Models assigned per feature.
subtitle.fiscal: Your organization's fiscal profile: VAT regime, legal notices, NF 525 / ZATCA compliance.
subtitle.organization: Legal information, branding, team and permissions for your organization.
subtitle.payment: Payment providers (Stripe, PayPal, PayTabs, CMI…) and split rules.
subtitle.integrations: Connect your third-party tools: e-signature, accounting, KYC, legal compliance, OTA channels.
subtitle.payouts: Schedule and calculation rules for owner payouts.
subtitle.amenitiesOta: Map amenities detected on your OTA listings (Airbnb, Booking, etc.) to the Baitly reference. Create your own amenities if nothing matches.

subtitle.overview: Overview: KPIs, planning, critical alerts and quick access to your activity.
subtitle.noise: Minut noise monitoring on your properties: real-time alerts, history and per-property thresholds.
subtitle.smartLock: Status and control of your smart locks (Tuya, Nuki): remote unlocking and battery.
subtitle.keyExchange: Key exchange via KeyNest and key boxes: tracking transfers between guests and teams.
subtitle.simulator: Analytical simulator: revenue, occupancy and performance projections on variable scenarios.

subtitle.properties: List of your properties with their status, occupancy rate and alerts.
subtitle.pricing: Dynamic pricing configuration per property: base price, seasonality, adjustments.
subtitle.vouchers: Promo codes and auto campaigns applicable to nightly rates: percentage or fixed discount, per-property scope.
subtitle.connectedObjects: Monitor and control your locks, sensors and keys, property by property.

directory.title: Directory
directory.default: Manage teams, portfolios, guests, users and organizations

subtitle.users: Platform user accounts: roles, permissions, activation and access reset.
subtitle.teams: Operational teams (cleaning, maintenance, supervision): composition, specialties and availability.
subtitle.portfolios: Property groupings by owner or management portfolio to ease oversight.
subtitle.organizations: Client organizations (multi-tenant): legal information, branding and configuration.
subtitle.guests: Centralized database of guests who stayed at or contacted your properties: history and preferences.
subtitle.prospection: Sales pipeline: CSV imports, enrichment and tracking of qualified prospects.

subtitle.internalChat: Internal conversations between members of your organization: teams, supervision and coordination.
subtitle.archived: Archived conversation history: read-only consultation, search and restoration.
subtitle.receivedForms: Incoming requests via your public forms (contact, quote, report): triage and response.
subtitle.channelMessages: Guest messages from your OTA channels (Airbnb, Booking) centralized in a unified inbox.

subtitle.catalog: Template catalog by guest journey step: messaging, documents, communications.
subtitle.messageTemplates: Automated messaging templates (check-in, welcome, pricing push) triggered by events.
subtitle.whatsappTemplates: Standard WhatsApp templates (check-in, access code, checkout reminder) — editable per language, submitted to Meta for approval.
subtitle.emailTemplates: Baitly system email templates (noise alerts, invitations, landing notifications) — subject and HTML body editable per language.
subtitle.documentTemplates: Library of PDF templates (invoices, certificates, inventory) versioned and reusable.
subtitle.history: Unified history of sent messages and generated documents, filterable by channel and status.
subtitle.variablesAndTags: Reference for available variables ({{guest.name}}, {{property.address}}…) to personalize your templates.
subtitle.compliance: Compliance dashboard: NF invoices, legal certificates, search by document number.

reports.title: Reports
reports.default: Generate and view reports from your Baitly platform

subtitle.financial: Revenue per property, operating costs, net margin and accounting exports for the chosen period.
subtitle.interventions: Volume, average delays and completion rates of interventions by type and team.
subtitle.teams: Workload, performance and availability per team and per member.
subtitle.properties: Occupancy rate, RevPAR, maintenance alerts and health indicators per property.

tarification.title: Pricing Configuration
tarification.default: Manage weighting coefficients, base prices and subscriptions

subtitle.pms: PMS services pricing configuration: subscriptions, tiers and options.
subtitle.entretien: Cleaning and maintenance services pricing: packages, surcharges and coefficients.
subtitle.travaux: Pricing grid for works and technical interventions by job category.
subtitle.exterieur: Outdoor services pricing: gardening, pool, green spaces.
subtitle.blanchisserie: Linen pricing: packages per item type, washing and delivery.
subtitle.monitoring: Noise monitoring offers pricing (Minut, Roomonitor) propagated to clients.

billing.title: Billing
billing.default: Payments, invoices, payouts, expenses and accounting reports

subtitle.payments: Guest payment history: status, payment method, refunds and reconciliation.
subtitle.invoices: Issued invoices (stays, fees, services) and credit notes: PDF generation, sending and payment tracking.
subtitle.wallets: Wallet balance per owner: movements, holds, withdrawals and detailed history.
subtitle.payouts: Owner payouts schedule: SEPA calculations, status, bank exports.
subtitle.expenses: Tracking operational expenses by category and property: supplier invoices, rebilling.
subtitle.reportsExports: Fiscal report (VAT, taxes, NF 525) and accounting exports formatted for your third-party tools.

monitoring.title: System Monitoring
monitoring.default: Complete monitoring of the Baitly platform

subtitle.tokens: Monitoring AI tokens consumed per feature: counters, costs and key rotation.
subtitle.keycloak: Keycloak metrics (sessions, login, refresh) and integration test coverage.
subtitle.audit: Timestamped audit log: connections, data access, admin actions and denied permissions.
subtitle.healthChecks: Health checks of dependent services (DB, Redis, Kafka, OAuth) and real-time system metrics.

syncAdmin.title: Sync & Diagnostics
syncAdmin.default: Channel synchronization supervision and system diagnostics

subtitle.connections: Real-time tracking of OTA connections (Airbnb, Booking, Channex): status, tokens, last sync.
subtitle.syncEvents: Calendar synchronization events (push/pull): volume per channel and status.
subtitle.outbox: Kafka outbox pattern: events pending, sent or failed, with on-demand retry.
subtitle.calendar: Audit of calendar commands (book, cancel, block, price) and detection of multi-channel conflicts.
subtitle.mappings: Property ↔ external listing correspondences per channel (Airbnb ID, Booking hotel ID, etc.).
subtitle.diagnostics: System diagnostics: scheduled tasks, jobs in progress, recent errors and integrations status.
subtitle.reconciliation: Calendar reconciliation runs: detection of divergences between Baitly and OTA, manual triggering.
